active.title: Observability trace hooks
active.notes: Tracing helper emits JSON logs with request IDs and wraps worker fetch; smoke script captures sample spans.

active.title: Evidence locker
active.notes: Evidence locker persists blobs to R2 with sha256 keys and optionally mirrors to S3; contract covered by unit tests.

active.title: IdP interface & fallback mocks
active.notes: Defined IdP adapter contract, provided mock adapters (Okta, Entra, Google, AWS, Paycom, CrowdStrike) and dev fallback OIDC provider with contract tests.

active.title: Policy engine evidence baseline
active.notes: Policy controls enforce MFA, password length >=12, device posture=healthy. Evidence hashed under artifacts/policy; compliance snapshot renderer outputs docs/COMPLIANCE_SNAPSHOT.md and run metadata. QA: regenerate with `node scripts/generate-evidence.mjs` then `npm run render:compliance`.
